## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Related requirements and issues

<!-- Link issues and list affected L1/L2 requirement IDs. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] Specification or wire-contract change
- [ ] Security or dependency update

## Verification

<!-- List commands run and relevant results. -->

- [ ] `dotnet build --configuration Release`
- [ ] `dotnet test --configuration Release`
- [ ] Performance checks run when deterministic throughput changed
- [ ] Documentation links checked when Markdown changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Behavior changes are covered by traced acceptance tests
- [ ] Requirement IDs, VCRM entries, and detailed designs remain aligned
- [ ] Clean-room and architecture boundaries are preserved
- [ ] No secrets, mission data, credentials, or private source material are present
- [ ] Security, compatibility, migration, performance, and rollback effects are documented
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and public documentation are updated when appropriate
- [ ] The diff is focused and excludes unrelated formatting
